TopModule.BindInstances: y_partial_U y_partial_1_U y_partial_2_U y_partial_3_U y_partial_4_U y_partial_5_U y_partial_6_U y_partial_7_U y_partial_8_U y_partial_9_U y_partial_10_U y_partial_11_U y_partial_12_U y_partial_13_U y_partial_14_U y_partial_15_U icmp_ln355_fu_279_p2 icmp_ln355_1_fu_285_p2 or_ln355_fu_291_p2 control_s_axi_U gmem0_m_axi_U gmem1_m_axi_U gmem2_m_axi_U gmem3_m_axi_U gmem4_m_axi_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Read/Write, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding, Resource Estimate
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
num_rows, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of num_rows,
num_cols, 0x18, 32, W, Data signal of num_cols,
nnz, 0x20, 32, W, Data signal of nnz,
A_row_idx_1, 0x28, 32, W, Data signal of A_row_idx,
A_row_idx_2, 0x2c, 32, W, Data signal of A_row_idx,
A_col_ptr_1, 0x34, 32, W, Data signal of A_col_ptr,
A_col_ptr_2, 0x38, 32, W, Data signal of A_col_ptr,
A_values_1, 0x40, 32, W, Data signal of A_values,
A_values_2, 0x44, 32, W, Data signal of A_values,
x_1, 0x4c, 32, W, Data signal of x,
x_2, 0x50, 32, W, Data signal of x,
y_1, 0x58, 32, W, Data signal of y,
y_2, 0x5c, 32, W, Data signal of y,

table.keys: Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Usage, HW Info
table.column: s_axi_control, register, offset, name=A_row_idx_1 offset=0x28 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=A_row_idx_2 offset=0x2c range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=A_col_ptr_1 offset=0x34 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=A_col_ptr_2 offset=0x38 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=A_values_1 offset=0x40 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=A_values_2 offset=0x44 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=x_1 offset=0x4c range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=x_2 offset=0x50 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=y_1 offset=0x58 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=y_2 offset=0x5c range=32

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

table.keys: HW Interface, Direction, Length, Width, Loop, Loop Location
HW Interface, Variable, Access Location, Direction, Burst Status, Length, Loop, Loop Location, Resolution, Problem
table.column: row_in, ../HLS/src/spmv_csc.cpp:91:22, read, Widen Fail, , VITIS_LOOP_89_1, ../HLS/src/spmv_csc.cpp:89:22, 214-353, Could not widen since type i512 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0

A_col_ptr, ../HLS/src/spmv_csc.cpp:49:13, read, Widen Fail, , VITIS_LOOP_46_1, ../HLS/src/spmv_csc.cpp:46:22, 214-353, Could not widen since type i32 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0

val_in, ../HLS/src/spmv_csc.cpp:92:24, read, Widen Fail, , VITIS_LOOP_89_1, ../HLS/src/spmv_csc.cpp:89:22, 214-353, Could not widen since type i512 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0

x_in, ../HLS/src/spmv_csc.cpp:61:21, read, Widen Fail, , VITIS_LOOP_46_1, ../HLS/src/spmv_csc.cpp:46:22, 214-353, Could not widen since type float size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0

y_out, ../HLS/src/spmv_csc.cpp:295:18, write, Widen Fail, , VITIS_LOOP_273_1, ../HLS/src/spmv_csc.cpp:273:23, 214-353, Could not widen since type i512 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0

Msg.msg_body: Since the only kind of statements allowed in a canonical dataflow region are variable declarations and function calls, the compiler may not be able to correctly handle the region

Pragma.options: m_axi port = A_row_idx offset = slave bundle = gmem0 depth = (((200000) + (16) - 1) / (16))
m_axi port = A_col_ptr offset = slave bundle = gmem1 depth = (1024 + 1)
m_axi port = A_values offset = slave bundle = gmem2 depth = (((200000) + (16) - 1) / (16))
m_axi port = x offset = slave bundle = gmem3 depth = 1024
m_axi port = y offset = slave bundle = gmem4 depth = (((1024) + (16) - 1) / (16))
variable = y_partial type = ram_t2p impl = uram
